name: Venture Minerals Limited
description: Venture Minerals Limited, now known as Critica Limited (ASX: CRI), is an Australian-based mineral exploration and development company. The company focuses on the advancement of critical mineral projects, most notably the Jupiter Project in Western Australia. Its strategic objective is to develop a mine-to-magnet supply chain to meet the growing global demand for rare earth elements, which are essential for technologies such as electric vehicles, renewable energy systems, and artificial intelligence. The company is committed to delivering high-grade, clay-hosted rare earth resources through innovative beneficiation technology and sustainable mining practices.
